title: Charley's Aunt
writer: Joseph Farnham, Brandon Thomas, F. McGrew Willis
actors: Syd Chaplin, Ethel Shannon, James E. Page
plot: Charley Wyckham and Jack Chesney pressure fellow student Fancourt Babberly to pose as Charley's Brazilian Aunt Donna Lucia. Their purpose is to have a chaperone for their amorous visits with Amy and Kitty, niece and ward of crusty...
